episodes.title: Can true friendship survive the pain of infertility and pregnancy? A lesson in grace.
episodes.description:
True friendship is often tested by the seasons of life, particularly when one friend walks the path of pregnancy while the other navigates the heartache of infertility. This powerful conversation explores the raw, honest, and often painful moments that arise between two people who love each other deeply. It is a beautiful reflection on how surrender allows us to release our own expectations and trust in the story God is unfolding. Through the lens of faith, we see how He heals wounds and turns what feels like a secondary plan into the perfect, purposeful family journey He had intended all along. Discover how His grace sustains us when we feel like we are failing, and how He leads us into a future filled with unexpected joy.
#faith #adoption #testimony #god #Christianfriendship #InfertilityJourney #TrustingGod #AdoptionStory #FindingHope #GodsPlan #FaithOverFear #ChristianLiving
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Brittiny & Kacie: Adoption Wasn’t Option B...It Was Always God’s Plan A (Testimony) | EP #65 (Pt 3)
episodes.description:
In the final part of Brittiny and Kacie’s story, the conversation moves into the tender intersection of infertility, pregnancy, friendship, and adoption. Kacie shares the painful process of grieving the dream of having biological children, while also asking God to bring her and Ben to a place where adoption was not seen as “option B,” but as the family story He had been writing all along.

This episode is a beautiful picture of Christian friendship, surrender, open adoption, answered prayer, and the goodness of God in a plan that looked different than expected. If you have ever had to release a dream, wait on the Lord, or trust Him with a story you never would have chosen, this testimony is a reminder that God’s plan is never second best.

For more information about New Life Adoptions, please go to their website at https://newlifeadopt.com. If you're considering adoption or would like to support the amazing God-honoring work they do, their website is the perfect place to start.

episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: When grief meets the grace of a friend.
episodes.description:
True healing often begins when we allow others to carry our heaviest burdens. This touching reflection highlights the profound beauty found in the presence of a supportive community during moments of deep sorrow. Even when pain feels overwhelming and words fall short, the love of a friend can serve as a gentle reminder of the Savior’s comforting embrace. Through tears and vulnerability, the Lord tenderly meets those who are hurting, proving that He is close to the brokenhearted and sustains those who are weary. It is a beautiful testament to how faith, friendship, and divine compassion intertwine to bring hope to the darkest seasons of life.
#faith #infertility #god #testimony #grief #healing #faith #community #jesus #encouragement #hope
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Brittiny & Kacie: Finding God’s Goodness in the Desert (Testimony) | EP#64 (Pt 2)
episodes.description:
In Part 2 of Brittiny and Kacie’s story, the conversation moves into some of the painful places where faith can feel confusing: spiritual dryness, adult grief, divorce, cancer, caregiving, loneliness, and the heartbreak of infertility. Both women share honestly about wrestling with God’s goodness when life did not feel good, and how the Lord slowly met them through truth, counseling, marriage, church community, and friendship.

This episode is raw, tender, and full of hope. If you have ever walked through a season where God felt far away, where your prayers seemed unanswered, or where grief changed the way you saw your life, this testimony is a reminder that Jesus is still present in the desert—and His goodness is not limited to the parts of the story we understand.

episodes.title: Stop Fixing Everything! Embrace Freedom & Your True Nature #shorts
episodes.description: Embracing faith's difficult transitions means releasing control. Though hard to reach, the freedom found in letting go and trusting God is profound. Keep your hands out of it, Lord. #FaithJourney #ChristianLiving #LetGoAndTrust #SpiritualGrowth #ReleaseControl
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Graduated Poli Sci? My UNCERTAIN Future & God's Plan #shorts
episodes.description: Graduating with uncertainty, but finding faith and encouragement. God always provides, surrounding us with people who speak truth and love us well. #FaithJourney #GodsProvision #Encouragement #LifeAfterGraduation #ChristianLiving
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Tired of Pain? Woman Rejects God's Path for Her Own! #shorts
episodes.description: Tired of following God's path, feeling only pain? A raw moment of questioning faith and seeking a new way. #ChristianFaith #SpiritualJourney #FaithStruggles #GodsLove
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Legally Blind: I Played Basketball Without Knowing! #shorts
episodes.description: Discovering legal blindness in one eye is a profound moment. Our eyes can compensate surprisingly well, even allowing for sports! Learn if your vision is truly as clear as you think. #VisionCheck #EyeHealth #DidYouKnow #HealthFacts
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Jesus' Revelation: Letting Go of Plans, Embracing His #shorts
episodes.description: When life's path veers from the expected, a loving God's bigger plan brings profound peace and liberation. Letting go allows for true freedom. #FaithJourney #GodsPlan #FindingPeace #ChristianLiving #SpiritualGrowth #Barko
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: My Whole Life Packed Up Overnight: The Shocking Apartment Move #shorts
episodes.description: One night, I woke up in my familiar bed. The next morning, my entire childhood home was packed and empty, and I was in a new apartment. God's plan unfolded in a single night, a testament to His powerful guidance. #FaithJourney #GodsPlan #ChristianLiving #TrustInGod #MiracleMove
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Loving Others in Pain #shorts
episodes.description: Witness a profound act of faith as a daughter entrusts her parents to God's loving care. A heartfelt prayer for healing and spiritual connection, laying all concerns at Jesus' feet. #Faith #Prayer #ChristianLiving #FamilyLove #GodsCare
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Mom's Powerful Prayer: Divine Assurance Through Faith #shorts
episodes.description: She prayed for weeks, fearing she'd be taken from her girls. Then, the Lord's gentle reminder: 'They have Me.' Her surrender brought peace, trusting His will completely. #Faith #ChristianFaith #GodsWill #MothersLove #TrustInGod
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Finding Peace Through Complete Trust in God #shorts
episodes.description: In moments of overwhelming pain and uncertainty, I found strength not in my own plans, but in surrendering completely to the Lord. Trusting His love for my parents, and praying they come to know His peace. #FaithJourney #ChristianLiving #TrustInGod #SpiritualGrowth #Prayer
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: A Divine Intervention: Faith in the Face of Adversity #shorts
episodes.description: Mom was just days away from missing out on a crucial research drug. Then, a last-minute enrollment opened, making her the 11th participant. A moment of divine timing, proving God's faithfulness. #Faith #DivineIntervention #GodsTiming #Miracle #Hope
episodes.author: The Real Jesus Experience

episodes.title: Brittiny & Kacie: Saved Young, Shaken Deeply, and Kept by God (Testimony) | EP#63 (Pt 1)
episodes.description:
Brittiny and Kacie were both saved young, but the years that followed shook them deeply. In Part 1, they share how family pain, pressure, grief, and unanswered questions shaped their early lives—and how God was still holding them through it all.

This is a raw and hope-filled conversation about childhood faith, deep wounds, and the quiet faithfulness of Jesus in seasons that make no sense. If you’ve ever wrestled with pain, trust, or what it means to be kept by God, this episode will speak to you.
